inputs.label: Personal Property Value
inputs.businessContext: Estimated value of personal belongings to be insured.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated value of personal belongings to be insured.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Wert der zu versichernden persönlichen Gegenstände.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur estimée des effets personnels à assurer.
Montant de protection responsabilité civile souhaité.

inputs.label: Deductible
inputs.businessContext: Amount you pay out-of-pocket before insurance kicks in.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you pay out-of-pocket before insurance kicks in.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sigorta devreye girmeden önce cepten ödediğiniz tutar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie aus eigener Tasche zahlen, bevor die Versicherung greift.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous payez de votre poche avant que l'assurance n'intervienne.

inputs.label: Location Risk Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier based on crime rate and disaster risk (1.0 = average).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier based on crime rate and disaster risk (1.0 = average).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Suç oranı ve afet riskine dayalı çarpan (1.0 = ortalama).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator basierend auf Kriminalitätsrate und Katastrophenrisiko (1,0 = Durchschnitt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur basé sur le taux de criminalité et le risque de catastrophe (1,0 = moyen).

inputs.label: Security System Discount
inputs.businessContext: Discount percentage off premium for having an approved security system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Discount percentage off premium for having an approved security system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Onaylı bir güvenlik sistemine sahip olmanın prim üzerinden indirim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentualer Rabatt auf die Prämie für ein zugelassenes Sicherheitssystem.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de réduction sur la prime pour avoir un système de sécurité approuvé.
